description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and appliqué work on the arm, hood with chunky drawcords, full length zippered placket, two pouch pockets on the front, graphic print on the left chest and above the hem and striping on the ribbed cuffs and hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations; press while damp for crisp finish Comfort at it's best, this sweatshirt from classic polo guarantees a warm cosy feeling, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pop it on over sportswear or casual clothing for a relaxed and stylish top layer. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
